# Peertalk (vendored)

This directory will hold a vendored copy of Peertalk (or a maintained fork), which provides USB communication between macOS and iOS over `usbmuxd`. Used by both `DispadHost` and `DispadClient` to establish the Mac ↔ iPad data channel.

Peertalk is MIT-licensed. Its original LICENSE must be preserved here alongside the source when added.

Upstream: https://github.com/rsms/peertalk
